subject: [PATCH 2/4] mm: bypass mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the patch, suggesting that it may not be necessary to move the VM_EXEC readahead block above the mmap_miss check. Proposed an alternative solution and asked for further discussion.

2026-03-10.patch_summary: The patch modifies the do_sync_mmap_readahead() function to bypass the mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead. This change allows arch-preferred folio orders to be requested for executable memory, which can improve performance on certain architectures.
